evidence.description: In a 2018 interview, Kangarloo stated regarding Hezbollah's hostage-taking: 'We take hostages because it can be useful for us,' suggesting operational coordination with Hezbollah's activities.

editorial_notes: Kangarloo's 2018 statement suggests he had operational awareness of and involvement in Hezbollah's hostage strategy. Confidence set to alleged as the exact nature of the relationship is not fully documented.
